ddls:
CREATE TABLE "anime" (
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anime title */,
  "name" TEXT /* Main name of the anime title */,
  "name_japanese" TEXT /* Name of the anime in Japanese */,
  "name_english" TEXT /* Name of the anime in English */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the anime */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the anime */,
  "members" INTEGER /* Number of members who rated the anime */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief synopsis or description of the anime */,
  "synopsis_japanese" TEXT /* Synopsis of the anime in Japanese */,
  "synopsis_english" TEXT /* Synopsis of the anime in English */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the anime */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the anime (e.g., airing, finished, not yet aired) */,
  "studio" TEXT /* Studio that produced the anime */,
  "source_material" TEXT /* Source material of the anime (e.g., manga, light novel) */,
  "age_rating" TEXT /* Age rating of the anime (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the anime for advanced filtering */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the anime */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the anime details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user notifications */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or profile description */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile picture */,
  "favorite_genres" TEXT /* User's favorite genres (comma-separated list) */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user receives email notifications */,
  "push_notifications" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user receives push notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the anime */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime that was watched */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date when the anime was watched */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the anime (e.g., watching, completed, on-hold) */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number watched */,
  "duration_watched" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode watched (in minutes) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for watching (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location (e.g., IP address, geolocation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the anime */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime that was rated */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user (1 to 10) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., overall, story, animation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anime_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime that the comment is for */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment made by the user */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., review, discussion) */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the comment */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes for the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anime_comments_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anime_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Comedy) */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anime_genre" (
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime title */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the anime */,
  "primary_genre" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the genre is primary or secondary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anime_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended anime title */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the admin */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., content management, user management) */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the moderator */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., content review, user review) */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignment" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "assignment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignment_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignment_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anime_trailers" (
  "trailer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trailer */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime title associated with the trailer */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL for the trailer video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the trailer was uploaded */,
  "trailer_type" TEXT /* Type of trailer (e.g., official, fan-made) */,
  "trailer_views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trailer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anime_trailers_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_forums" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum thread */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime title related to the thread */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the thread */,
  "thread_title" TEXT /* Title of the forum thread */,
  "thread_content" TEXT /* Content of the forum thread */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the thread was created */,
  "thread_type" TEXT /* Type of thread (e.g., discussion, poll) */,
  "thread_status" TEXT /* Status of the thread (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "thread_views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the thread */,
  "thread_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the thread */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_forums_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_forums_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id")
)
